name: Userspace Package Homes
description: Configures writable userspace directories for global package installs (pnpm, pipx, npm). Ensures global installs default to stable, writable locations under the user's home directory.

configurePnpm.description: Configure PNPM_HOME to ~/.local/share/pnpm and add it to PATH.

configurePipx.description: Configure PIPX_BIN_DIR to ~/.local/bin and add it to PATH.

configureNpm.description: Configure NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX to ~/.npm-global and add its bin directory to PATH.
